Uses of Class
com.github.copilot.rpc.MessageOptions

Packages that use MessageOptions
Package
Description
com.github.copilot
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.rpc
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.

  • Uses of MessageOptions in com.github.copilot

    Methods in com.github.copilot with parameters of type MessageOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<String>
    CopilotSession.send(MessageOptions options)
    Sends a message to the Copilot session.
    CompletableFuture<AssistantMessageEvent>
    CopilotSession.sendAndWait(MessageOptions options)
    Sends a message and waits until the session becomes idle with default 60 second timeout.
    CompletableFuture<AssistantMessageEvent>
    CopilotSession.sendAndWait(MessageOptions options, long timeoutMs)
    Sends a message and waits until the session becomes idle.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.clone()
    Creates a shallow clone of this MessageOptions instance.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setAgentMode(AgentMode agentMode)
    Sets the per-message agent UI mode.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setAttachments(List<? extends MessageAttachment> attachments)
    Sets attachments to include with the message.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setDisplayPrompt(String displayPrompt)
    Sets the display prompt shown in the timeline instead of the prompt.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setMode(String mode)
    Sets the message delivery mode.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setPrompt(String prompt)
    Sets the message prompt to send to the assistant.
    MessageOptions
    MessageOptions.setRequestHeaders(Map<String,String> requestHeaders)
    Sets custom per-turn HTTP headers for outbound model requests.
